data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for multi-part MIME.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the multi-part MIME requirement, but the provided evidence does not include any references to the implementation or existence of multi-part MIME (HTML + plain text fallback) in the system. The linked use case mentions the need for multi-part MIME, but there is no concrete evidence demonstrating that this requirement is satisfied. Therefore, the validation is inconclusive due to a lack of supporting evidence.
gaps: No evidence of multi-part MIME (HTML + plain text fallback) implementation.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
